message:
test(surface): expand tests across change, hyperlink, line, and surface modules

Add 1211 lines of new tests across 5 modules in the frankenterm surface
crate, covering the terminal surface abstraction layer that manages
cell grids, line storage, change tracking, and hyperlink handling.

Module-by-module breakdown:

  change.rs (+334 lines):
    - Change enum variant construction and application (Text, Attribute,
      CursorPosition, ClearScreen, ClearToEndOfLine, etc.)
    - ChangeSequence building and flattening
    - Image change attachment with dimensions and placement
    - Attribute change composition (foreground, background, intensity,
      underline, strikethrough, blink, inverse, invisible)
    - Change delta computation between surface states
    - Cursor visibility and shape changes

  hyperlink.rs (+84 lines):
    - Hyperlink construction with URI and id parameters
    - Implicit vs explicit hyperlink identity
    - Hyperlink equality semantics (same URI, different ids)
    - Rule matching for OSC 8 hyperlink parameters
    - Hyperlink::with_params() builder pattern

  lib.rs (+446 lines):
    - Surface construction with dimensions and resize behavior
    - Cell addressing and content retrieval
    - Screen line iteration and dirty-line tracking
    - Surface::draw_from_screen() compositing
    - Title and icon name change handling
    - Cursor position clamping at surface boundaries
    - Surface diff generation for incremental updates
    - Scrollback region management and pruning
    - Alternate screen buffer switching

  line/cellref.rs (+220 lines):
    - CellRef construction from Line storage
    - Cell attribute access through CellRef indirection
    - Wide character handling (CJK double-width cells)
    - Cluster decomposition for grapheme-aware rendering
    - CellRef comparison and equality semantics
    - Trailing whitespace detection via CellRef iteration

  line/linebits.rs (+127 lines):
    - LineBits flag operations (set, clear, test, toggle)
    - DIRTY, HAS_HYPERLINK, HAS_IMPLICIT_HYPERLINKS, DOUBLE_WIDTH,
      DOUBLE_HEIGHT_TOP, DOUBLE_HEIGHT_BOTTOM flag semantics
    - Bitwise combination and intersection of line flags
    - Flag serialization for session persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
